ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the schools table */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the student (M for male, F for female) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address type (U for urban, R for rural) */,
  "famsize" TEXT /* Family size (GT3 for greater than 3, LE3 for less than or equal to 3) */,
  "Pstatus" TEXT /* Parental cohabitation status (T for living together, A for apart) */,
  "Medu" INTEGER /* Mother's education level (0 - none, 1 - primary, 2 - secondary, 3 - higher, 4 - university) */,
  "Fedu" INTEGER /* Father's education level (0 - none, 1 - primary, 2 - secondary, 3 - higher, 4 - university) */,
  "Mjob" TEXT /* Mother's job (teacher, health care, services, at_home, other) */,
  "Fjob" TEXT /* Father's job (teacher, health care, services, at_home, other) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for choosing the school (reputation, course, home, other) */,
  "guardian" TEXT /* Guardian of the student (mother, father, other) */,
  "traveltime" INTEGER /* Travel time to school (1 - <15 min, 2 - 15-30 min, 3 - 30-60 min, 4 - >60 min) */,
  "studytime" INTEGER /* Weekly study time (1 - <2 hours, 2 - 2-5 hours, 3 - 5-10 hours, 4 - >10 hours) */,
  "failures" INTEGER /* Number of past class failures */,
  "schoolsup" TEXT /* Extra educational support (yes, no) */,
  "famsup" TEXT /* Family educational support (yes, no) */,
  "paid" TEXT /* Extra paid classes (yes, no) */,
  "activities" TEXT /* Extra-curricular activities (yes, no) */,
  "nursery" TEXT /* Attended nursery school (yes, no) */,
  "higher" TEXT /* Wants to take higher education (yes, no) */,
  "internet" TEXT /* Internet access at home (yes, no) */,
  "romantic" TEXT /* With a romantic relationship (yes, no) */,
  "famrel" INTEGER /* Quality of family relationships (1 - very bad, 5 - excellent) */,
  "freetime" INTEGER /* Free time after school (1 - very low, 5 - very high) */,
  "goout" INTEGER /* Going out with friends (1 - very low, 5 - very high) */,
  "Dalc" INTEGER /* Workday alcohol consumption (1 - very low, 5 - very high) */,
  "Walc" INTEGER /* Weekend alcohol consumption (1 - very low, 5 - very high) */,
  "health" INTEGER /* Current health status (1 - very bad, 5 - very good) */,
  "absences" INTEGER /* Number of school absences */,
  "approved" INTEGER /* Approved for graduation (1 - yes, 0 - no) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "school_type" TEXT /* Type of the school (public, private) */,
  "school_address" TEXT /* Address of the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_performance" (
  "academic_performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic performance record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the students table */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the grade (math, science, language, etc.) */,
  "grade" INTEGER /* Grade achieved by the student (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("academic_performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "extracurricular_activities" (
  "extracurricular_activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each extracurricular activity record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the students table */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the extracurricular activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of the extracurricular activity (sports, music, art, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("extracurricular_activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "support_systems" (
  "support_system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each support system record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the students table */,
  "support_type" TEXT /* Type of support (academic, emotional, financial) */,
  "support_provider" TEXT /* Provider of the support (school, family, external) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("support_system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_identification" (
  "risk_identification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk identification record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the students table */,
  "risk_factor" TEXT /* Risk factor (academic, behavioral, emotional) */,
  "risk_level" INTEGER /* Risk level (low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_identification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the students table */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the reports table */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (bar chart, line graph, etc.) */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Data for the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (admin, educator, analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "user_access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the students table */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_access_id")
)
